name: SumberYAML Manual Input Fallback Safe Patch
purpose: Inject direct proxy nodes from input/links.txt/input.txt into every processed OpenClash YAML output without alive filtering, then build a dedicated manual fallback group.

manual_accounts_policy.insertion_order: same order as input file, placed at top of proxies section
manual_accounts_policy.unparsable_policy: reported but not forced into YAML, because invalid proxy objects make OpenClash fail to run
